residual_momentum.beta_window: 504 daily returns ending t-253; OLS stock return on intercept and SPY return; minimum 450 paired observations
residual_momentum.signal_window: daily returns t-252 through t-21 inclusive; frozen alpha and beta; minimum 220 paired observations
residual_momentum.selection: Top10; retain through rank15; ascending symbol tie-break; equal 10%
residual_momentum.benchmark: same-date residual-eligible qualified stocks equal weight

providers: SEC companyfacts/submissions only if compliant route is needed and available
profitability_contingency.pit_rule: latest revision publicly available at formation; minimum two trading sessions after announcement/accepted_at
profitability_contingency.gross_profit: explicit gross profit or same-period/currency/consolidation revenue minus cost of revenue
profitability_contingency.ineligible: banks, insurers, or issuers lacking comparable cost of revenue; no imputation
profitability_contingency.coverage_gate: at least 30 companies with four consecutive PIT quarters for at least 70% of eligible formation dates
profitability_contingency.strategy: TTM gross profit/latest positive finite total assets; quarterly; Top15; retain through rank20; ascending symbol tie-break; equal weight; next-session close

after_pass_only.retrospective: calendar years, frozen subperiods, monthly excess moving-block bootstrap length 3, seed 20260723, 10000 resamples
after_pass_only.pit_universe: maximum two public free sources; no current-universe backfill
after_pass_only.forward: after 2026-07-22; minimum 6 and target 12 complete month-ends; research-only
